description: The 'Ndrina Nasone is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in Scilla, Calabria, Italy. Active since at least the 1970s, it has been involved in mafia association, extortion, and other crimes. The clan faced several police operations, including Alba di Scilla 3 in 2013 and Lampetra in 2021, leading to arrests. Its current status is active.
